title: Set up Slack webhook for trade notifications
description: Create a Slack app with incoming webhooks and add SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to Railway.
steps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and create a new Slack app
Enable Incoming Webhooks in the app settings
Add the webhook to your #bahtzang-trades channel
Copy the webhook URL
Add SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to Railway env vars for the backend service
Trigger a manual /run on bahtzang.com and verify the notification arrives in Slack

title: Build portfolio snapshots endpoint
description: Add PortfolioSnapshot model, APScheduler job at 4:05 PM ET, and GET /portfolio/snapshots endpoint.
steps: Add PortfolioSnapshot model to models.py (date, total_equity, cash, invested, spy_close)
Add snapshot scheduler job at 4:05 PM ET in scheduler.py
Use Alpaca Data API to fetch SPY close price
Add GET /portfolio/snapshots?days=90 endpoint
Add POST /portfolio/snapshot for manual trigger
Verify snapshot is created after market close

title: Add equity curve chart component
description: LineChart showing portfolio vs SPY normalized returns over time.
steps: Create EquityCurveChart.tsx with Recharts LineChart
Two lines: portfolio (emerald) and SPY (zinc-400, dashed)
Normalize both to percentage return from day 1
Add to /analytics page below existing metrics cards
Test with mock data until snapshots accumulate

title: Migrate market data to Alpaca Data API
description: Replace Alpha Vantage for OHLCV data (200 req/min vs 25/day). Keep Alpha Vantage for news only.
steps: Add StockHistoricalDataClient to brokers/alpaca.py
Create get_daily_bars(tickers, days) function
Update market_data.py to use Alpaca for quotes instead of Alpha Vantage
Keep Alpha Vantage get_news() function unchanged
Test with 20 tickers fetched in a single API call

title: Implement pandas-ta technical indicators
description: Compute RSI, MACD, BBands, SMA50/200, ATR for portfolio tickers. Feed to Claude in CSV format.
steps: Add pandas-ta to requirements.txt
Create backend/app/technical_analysis.py with TechnicalAnalyzer class
Fetch 365 days of OHLCV from Alpaca Data API
Compute all 5 indicator groups via pandas-ta Strategy
Cache indicators daily (invalidate on date change)
Format as CSV for Claude prompt (~400 tokens for 20 stocks)
Wire into trade_executor.py between data gathering and Claude call

title: Add sector rotation signals
description: Track 11 sector ETFs relative strength vs SPY. Feed LEADING/LAGGING labels to Claude.
steps: Create backend/app/sector_rotation.py
Compute relative strength ratio (sector/SPY) for 11 ETFs
Compare ratio to 50-day SMA to determine LEADING/LAGGING
Format as CSV: etf,rs_trend,perf_1m%,perf_3m%,rsi14
Append to Claude prompt after technicals section

title: Implement Kelly criterion position sizing
description: Quarter-Kelly position sizing based on historical win rate + Claude confidence. Needs 30+ trades for calibration.
steps: Create backend/app/position_sizing.py
Compute win_rate and avg_win_loss_ratio from trades table (rolling 60 trades)
Implement kelly_position_size() with quarter-Kelly default
Use confidence**2 as modifier (penalizes low-confidence trades)
Cap at 10% of portfolio per position regardless of Kelly output
Add kelly_fraction field to GuardrailsConfig model
Replace static max_single_trade_size with dynamic Kelly-derived cap

title: Add circuit breakers (staged halts)
description: Three-tier circuit breaker: YELLOW (reduce sizing), ORANGE (halt buys), RED (full halt).
steps: Create backend/app/circuit_breaker.py
YELLOW: daily loss > 3% -> halve Kelly fraction (auto-reset next day)
ORANGE: weekly loss > 7% or 3 consecutive losses -> halt new buys
RED: daily loss > 5% or 5 consecutive losses -> flip kill switch
Call check_circuit_breakers() at top of _execute_cycle() before Claude
Add notification on circuit breaker trigger

title: Add PDT compliance tracking
description: Count day trades in rolling 5 business days. Block if approaching PDT limit for accounts <$25k.
steps: Add count_day_trades(db) function to guardrails.py
A day trade = buy and sell of same ticker on same day
Add check_pdt_compliance() to check_guardrails()
Display day trade count on Settings page
Alpaca has built-in PDT protection, but we want visibility

title: Compute and display Sharpe ratio
description: Annualized Sharpe from daily portfolio snapshots. Show confidence indicator (needs 60 days for significance).
steps: Create backend/app/analytics.py with compute_metrics()
Compute Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown, win rate, profit factor
Add confidence level: low (<30 days), moderate (<60), high (60+)
Add GET /portfolio/metrics endpoint
Display on /analytics page with color-coded stat cards
Show 'Sharpe: 1.24 (low confidence - 22/60 days)' format

title: Add drawdown chart to analytics
description: AreaChart showing peak-to-trough portfolio drawdown over time.
steps: Create DrawdownChart.tsx with Recharts AreaChart
Red gradient fill (always zero or negative values)
ReferenceLine at y=0
Add to /analytics page below equity curve

title: Populate Concepts page with trading ideas
description: Add strategic concepts, planned SEO pages, integration ideas, and UX mockup plans.
steps: Create frontend/src/data/concepts.ts with initial data
Strategic: multi-model consensus, backtesting, options, crypto, sentiment
SEO: AI Trading Bot Guide, Claude for Trading, Paper Trading Tutorial
Integrations: Finnhub, TradingView, Alpaca Data, Discord
UX: Mobile PWA, theme toggle, allocation sunburst

title: Update roadmap data to reflect current state
description: Many roadmap items are now done. Update statuses and add new items for upcoming phases.
steps: Mark completed items as done: broker abstraction, Alpaca integration, admin pages, goals/frequency
Add new items: portfolio snapshots, technical indicators, risk management, notifications
Update phase labels to match deepened roadmap plan

title: Add v0.7.0 to changelog
description: Document the 24-finding code review fixes + Slack notifications in a new changelog entry.
steps: Add v0.7.0 entry with 9 changes to changelog.ts
Include security type badge for guardrails migration and rate limiting
Add cross-link to code review roadmap section

title: Switch Claude prompt to CSV format
description: CSV uses 56% fewer tokens than JSON. Restructure the Claude prompt to use CSV for portfolio positions, technicals, and sector data.
steps: Format portfolio positions as CSV header + rows
Format technical indicators as CSV
Format sector rotation as CSV with LEADING/LAGGING labels
Remove json.dumps(indent=2) from prompt construction (already done)
Test that Claude still returns valid JSON decisions
